narrative:
South Bloomfield-South (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,161 registered voters, with 67.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a clear Republican lean of 9.6 percentage points.
